briefdescription.para: Make a copy of a struct. (Even though we initially pass is_owning: false, we then use the copy constructor to produce an owning instance.)

memberdef.argsstring: (int r, int g, int b, int a)
memberdef.name: ConstBox_Color

memberdef.argsstring: (float r, float g, float b, float a)
memberdef.name: ConstBox_Color

briefdescription.para: Convert from a struct by copying it. Note that only ConstBox_Color has this conversion, Box_Color intentionally doesn't.
Generated from conversion operator MR.Color.operator MR.Vector4i.
Generated from conversion operator MR.Color.operator MR.Vector4f.
Generated from class MR.Color. This is the const reference to the struct.
